# ZETUP PRO Corporate Services

> Dubai-based corporate services company providing transparent PRO services, mainland company formation, visa processing, Emiratisation compliance, and business support. Founded by Dennis Kristensen (Denmark) and Edina Sultan (17+ years UAE government expertise). Office in Business Bay, Dubai.

## Core Services
- [PRO Services Dubai](https://zetup.ae/en/services/pro-services): Government liaison, visa processing, document clearing, trade license management for Dubai mainland companies. Retainers from AED 8,000/month.
- [Company Formation Dubai](https://zetup.ae/en/services/company-formation): Mainland LLC formation with 100% foreign ownership. First-year costs AED 25,000–55,000.
- [Visa Processing](https://zetup.ae/en/services/visa-services): Employment, investor, dependent, Golden, and Green visa processing.
- [Emiratisation Services](https://zetup.ae/en/services/emiratisation): 2026 compliance management, Nafis registration, quota tracking, MoHRE reporting.
- [Trade License Renewal](https://zetup.ae/en/services/trade-license-renewal): Annual DET renewals, activity amendments, partner changes.
- [Corporate Tax Services](https://zetup.ae/en/services/corporate-tax): FTA coordination, EmaraTax filing, corporate tax compliance.
- [Document Clearing](https://zetup.ae/en/services/document-clearing): MOFA attestation, embassy attestation, document translation.
- [Golden Visa](https://zetup.ae/en/services/golden-visa): End-to-end Golden Visa applications for investors and executives.

## Comprehensive Guides
- [PRO Services Complete Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/pro-services-dubai-complete-guide): What PRO services are, costs, how to choose a provider.
- [Mainland Company Formation Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/dubai-mainland-company-formation): 10-step process, costs, documents, timeline.
- [Free Zone vs Mainland Comparison](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/free-zone-vs-mainland): Side-by-side analysis of trading rights, ownership, costs, visas.
- [UAE Visa Processing Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/uae-visa-processing): All visa types, processing times, requirements.
- [Emiratisation Compliance Guide 2026](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/emiratisation-compliance-2026): Quotas, fines, Nafis subsidies, compliance steps.
- [UAE Corporate Tax Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/uae-corporate-tax): 9% rate, Small Business Relief, filing deadlines.

## Key Facts
- Office: Churchill Executive Tower, Floor 35, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
- Phone: +971 4 323 4578
